name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible bug to help us improve

labels: ["bug"]

---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps To Reproduce

1. Go to `...`
2. Click on `...`
3. Scroll down to `...`
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

Describe what actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs

Add screenshots, console errors, or logs if available.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14]
- Browser: [e.g., Chrome 124]
- Node.js version: [e.g., 18.x]
- App version/commit: [e.g., v1.0.0 or commit hash]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
